query: SELECT * FROM island_guides WHERE nearbyAirports LIKE '%DRV%' LIMIT 1
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT * FROM island_guides WHERE nearbyAirports LIKE '%DRV%' LIMIT 1

rows.name: Eydhafushi
rows.overview: Welcome to this beautiful Maldivian island. Discover pristine beaches, crystal-clear waters, and authentic island experiences.
rows.quickFacts: ["🏝️ Pristine white sand beaches","🌊 Crystal-clear turquoise waters","🤿 Excellent snorkeling opportunities","🏄 Great water sports activities","👥 Friendly local community","🍜 Authentic Maldivian cuisine","🌅 Stunning sunset views","🚤 Easy accessibility from Male"]
rows.flightInfo: Domestic flight from Malé International Airport takes approximately 30-45 minutes. Several airlines operate regular flights.
rows.speedboatInfo: Speedboat transfer from Malé takes approximately 1-2 hours. Comfortable and scenic journey across the Indian Ocean.
rows.ferryInfo: Ferry service available from Malé with journey time of approximately 2-4 hours. Most economical option for budget travelers.
rows.topThingsToDo: [{"title":"🏖️ Beach Relaxation","description":"Unwind on pristine white sand beaches with turquoise waters. Perfect for swimming and sunbathing."},{"title":"🤿 Snorkeling","description":"Explore vibrant coral reefs and encounter tropical fish species in the crystal-clear waters."},{"title":"🏄 Water Sports","description":"Enjoy paddleboarding, kayaking, windsurfing, and other exciting water activities."},{"title":"🍜 Local Dining","description":"Enjoy authentic Maldivian cuisine at local restaurants. Try traditional dishes like garudhiya and mas huni."},{"title":"🚴 Island Cycling","description":"Explore the island on a bicycle. Visit local shops and experience daily island life."},{"title":"🌅 Sunset Walks","description":"Take peaceful evening strolls along the beach and watch the spectacular sunset over the Indian Ocean."}]
rows.foodCafes: [{"name":"Local Restaurant","description":"Authentic Maldivian seafood and traditional dishes","type":"Restaurant"},{"name":"Beachfront Cafe","description":"Casual dining with sea views and international options","type":"Cafe"},{"name":"Island Bakery","description":"Fresh bread, pastries, and light snacks","type":"Bakery"}]
rows.whatToPack: Sunscreen, swimwear, light clothing, hat, sunglasses, reef-safe sunscreen, waterproof bag
rows.healthTips: Stay hydrated in the tropical heat. Use reef-safe sunscreen. Bring basic medications. Drink bottled water.
rows.nearbyAirports: [{"code": "MLE", "description": "International flights to Malé, then speedboat to Eydhafushi.", "distance": "120 km", "duration": "2 hours", "name": "Malé International Airport", "transferType": "Speedboat"}, {"code": "DRV", "description": "Domestic flight to Dharavandhoo, then speedboat to Eydhafushi.", "distance": "45 km", "duration": "20 minutes", "name": "Dharavandhoo Airport", "transferType": "Domestic Flight"}]
rows.nearbyDiveSites: [{"name":"Dhigali Haa","distance":"12 km","difficulty":"Intermediate","description":"A stunning thila (underwater pinnacle) known for its vibrant coral gardens, diverse reef fish, and occasional sightings of grey reef sharks and eagle rays. Strong currents can be present."},{"name":"Dhonfanu Thila","distance":"15 km","difficulty":"Intermediate/Advanced","description":"A popular thila with dramatic overhangs and swim-throughs, teeming with colorful soft corals. Look out for schooling snappers, fusiliers, and reef sharks patrolling the deeper sections."},{"name":"Hanifaru Bay","distance":"18 km","difficulty":"Beginner (snorkeling)/Intermediate (diving)","description":"World-renowned marine protected area, famous for its seasonal aggregations of manta rays and whale sharks (typically May to November). Diving is restricted to specific times and conditions, often snorkeling is preferred for mantas."},{"name":"Nelivaru Haa","distance":"10 km","difficulty":"Beginner/Intermediate","description":"A relatively shallow thila with excellent visibility, perfect for macro photography. Expect to see nudibranchs, ghost pipefish, and a variety of small reef creatures among healthy hard corals."},{"name":"Muthafushi Thila","distance":"17 km","difficulty":"Intermediate","description":"An oval-shaped thila offering diverse marine life, including large schools of bannerfish and fusiliers. Keep an eye on the blue for pelagic species like tuna and barracuda."}]
rows.nearbySurfSpots: [{"name":"Thamburudhoo","distance":"50 km","difficulty":"Intermediate/Advanced","description":"A classic Maldivian left-hand reef break, known for its long, peeling walls and occasional barrel sections. Best surfed on a medium to large south-southeast swell."},{"name":"Chickens","distance":"55 km","difficulty":"Intermediate/Advanced","description":"A powerful and long left-hander that can offer rides up to 500 meters on the right swell. Named after the local chicken farm nearby, it's a favorite for experienced surfers."},{"name":"Cokes","distance":"60 km","difficulty":"Advanced","description":"A heavy, hollow right-hand reef break, famous for its intense barrels. Requires significant swell and is best suited for experienced surfers due to its power and shallow reef."}]
